title: Report on the proposed West Midlands Bus Network Support Grant scheme
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to WMCA concerning the proposed West Midlands Bus Network Support Grant scheme.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of WMCA’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed West Midlands Bus Network Support Grant scheme by West Midlands Combined Authority case page. "
